title: tetrameristaceae
intro: The Tetrameristaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a group of flowering plant species that are primarily found in tropical regions, particularly in Africa and Southeast Asia. The family Tetrameristaceae is characterized by its unique reproductive structures and is often associated with mycoheterotrophy, a trait where plants obtain nutrients by parasitizing fungi. The Tetrameristaceae family consists of approximately 16 species, all of which belong to the genus Tetrameris.
